scope.summary: Adds the local synthetic TCPS rig lane and B5/B6/P2-4 probes on top of the existing profile-backed TCPS terminator.
out_of_scope: No live OCI, ADB, field, or customer wallet material is included.
No sibling rust-oracledb checkout changes were made.
The B5 driver fix is not made here; the lane records the current pinned-driver red signature.
The P2-4 default-SNI behavior is not flipped here; the lane records the current server adapter red signature.

entry_points.name: scripts/rig/oracle_tcps_lane.sh run --log
entry_points.trace: Clean worktree /tmp/oraclemcp-d6-clean-1076065 at 0026b8cd: ORACLEMCP_RIG_CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target scripts/rig/oracle_tcps_lane.sh run --log passed. Events: synthetic_material_scan pass; B5 current_red_observed pass with call timeout of 20000 ms exceeded; B6 SSL_CERT_FILE root override 1 test matched and passed; B6 SSL_CERT_DIR root override 1 test matched and passed; P2-4 wallet default SNI current red 1 test matched and passed; P-U4 legacy 3DES server wallet path 1 test matched and passed; scenario_complete pass.

entry_points.name: default oci_tcps_e2e binary
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test oci_tcps_e2e -- --nocapture passed in the shared checkout before close evidence: 5 passed, 0 failed, 3 ignored. B5 fast-budget probes are ignored until the driver fix exists.

entry_points.name: rig script shell checks
entry_points.trace: bash -n scripts/rig/oracle_tcps_lane.sh and shellcheck scripts/rig/oracle_tcps_lane.sh passed.

entry_points.name: boundary lint
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target scripts/oraclemcp_boundary_lint.sh passed: oraclemcp-boundary-lint OK and rig-boundary-lint OK.

limitations: B5 is intentionally current-red against the pinned crates.io driver: the observed failure is call timeout of 20000 ms exceeded, not a fast UnknownIssuer.
P2-4 is intentionally current-red until the server wallet-implies-SNI default is flipped.
The lane is local-loopback synthetic TCPS only; it does not connect to live OCI or customer infrastructure.

known_defects.description: Pinned driver 0.9.0 still burns the full 20s call-timeout budget for the B5 UnknownIssuer probe.

follow_ups: Escalate the B5 driver behavior in oraclemcp tracking because the driver repository is out of scope for this agent.
Flip the B5 lane expectation from current-red to green after the driver fix is consumed.
Flip the P2-4 lane expectation after the server SNI-default bead lands.
